mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_accident_form ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_accident_form (title, description, division_name, department_name, evaluator, survey_date, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{divisionName}, #{departmentName}, #{evaluator}, #{surveyDate}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_safety_accident_form SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, division_name = #{divisionName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, evaluator = #{evaluator}, survey_date = #{surveyDate}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_accident_item WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_accident_item (form_id, item_no, accident_case, accident_type, near_miss, fatal_accident, leave_over_1month, leave_under_1month, no_leave, frequency, process_activity, sort_order, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{formId}, #{itemNo}, #{accidentCase}, #{accidentType}, #{nearMiss,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fatalAccident,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{leaveOver1month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{leaveUnder1month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{noLeave,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{frequency}, #{processActivity}, #{sortOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
